text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This problem can be solved only installing port news/inn later. 
"RUN_DEPENDS"ing to news/inn causes everyone who want to use trn 
as news "reader" are needed to install news/inn. 
Does this make happy trn users? 

# I haven't tried to use trn, so I'm sorry if this is a 
# silly opinion.
